question_text: Which of the following is the correct definition of pressure?

options.label: A
options.text: The total amount of force acting on an object

options.label: B
options.text: The force spread over an area

options.label: C
options.text: The weight of an object divided by its volume

explanation: Pressure is defined as force divided by area. When the same force is spread over a larger area, the pressure decreases; when concentrated over a smaller area, the pressure increases.
